human_annotation_protocol: not a trait; QC by conf threshold and manual spot check
validation_metric: precision/recall of detection vs manually boxed test images
notes: Upstream prerequisite for all ROI-A traits. One or more capitula per photo allowed.

model_type: YOLO detector (new class added to detector)
notes: New detection class not present in current best.pt; needed to separate involucre from corolla region.

primary_input_features: YOLO-pose keypoint head OR manual geometric rule from box edges
column12: Used with capitulum apex point to define the orientation vector.

classes_or_scale: upright (<=30 deg from vertical) | inclined (30-60 deg) | nodding (>60 deg)
human_annotation_protocol: two independent annotators label class from photo; disagreement adjudicated by a third
validation_metric: Cohen's kappa (annotators); accuracy / macro-F1 vs adjudicated label; per-species LOSO accuracy
notes: Requires camera-tilt screening: photos with visibly tilted horizon/plant are flagged and either excluded or kept as sensitivity subset.

model_type: geometric estimate from pedicel_keypoint/capitulum_apex_keypoint vector (primary); CNN angle regression as fallback when keypoints fail
human_annotation_protocol: independent double-annotation of both keypoints on subset; protractor-on-photo angle for a calibration subset
validation_metric: MAE and Spearman r vs human/protractor angle
notes: Continuous companion to head_orientation_class; thresholds above define the discrete class boundaries.

model_type: deterministic colour clustering in CIELAB space (k-means or percentile rule) on ROI-B pixels; CNN classifier as fallback
human_annotation_protocol: annotators pick class from ROI-B crop shown without ROI-A context
notes: ROI-B excludes involucre/leaf green to avoid contaminating colour estimate. No absolute colour calibration for citizen-science photos; treat as relative/ordinal only.

classes_or_scale: CIELAB L*/a*/b* (or hue-chroma-lightness) summary of corolla pixels
model_type: deterministic pixel statistics (median/robust mean per channel after simple grey-world white balance)
human_annotation_protocol: ranking subtask (order N images by darkness/hue) for a calibration subset; spectrometer or standard colour chart subset if available
validation_metric: Spearman r vs human ranking; agreement with flower_colour_class thresholds
notes: White-balance correction is per-image only (no cross-photo colour calibration); report as descriptive axis

trait_label: proportion of head apex covered by involucral bracts
classes_or_scale: 0-1 proportion of apex-facing area that is involucre (vs exposed corolla)
model_type: semantic segmentation (involucre / corolla / background) trained on manually annotated masks
human_annotation_protocol: polygon segmentation of involucre vs corolla vs background on a labelled subset; independent 0-4 ordinal cover score for a larger subset
validation_metric: Dice/IoU for segmentation; Spearman r of derived ratio vs human ordinal cover score
notes: Requires an automatic or annotated view-angle qualifier (near-lateral vs near-frontal vs oblique); frontal/oblique photos are flagged and analysed as a separate sensitivity subset because cover appears different by viewing angle.

classes_or_scale: width/height of the oriented bounding shape (head-axis aligned)
reference_frame: head-axis frame (rotated to capitulum long axis
primary_input_features: deterministic geometric measure from the segmentation mask / oriented bounding box
validation_metric: human relative shape estimate (globose/depressed/cylindrical) plus width/height ratio scored from photo on a subset
notes: Spearman r vs human relative estimate; agreement of derived class (below) with human class
column12: Rotated to the head's own long axis so shape is independent of how the photo was framed.

model_type: deterministic thresholding of head_shape_aspect_ratio + mask convexity
human_annotation_protocol: annotators assign one of three classes from ROI-A crop
notes: Thresholds fixed a priori from a calibration subset before touching the full global sample (avoid circular threshold-fitting).

trait_label: relative display allocation between corolla and involucre
classes_or_scale: exposed_corolla_area / (exposed_corolla_area + involucre_area); alternative denominator = full head bbox area
primary_input_features: derived from the same segmentation masks as involucral_cover_ratio
validation_metric: human ordinal "how much colour shows" rating (0-4) on a subset independent of the cover-score wording used for involucral_cover_ratio
notes: Spearman r vs human ordinal rating; correlation/redundancy check against involucral_cover_ratio (expected to be related but not identical)
column12: Kept as a separate axis from involucral_cover_ratio because cover asks "how enclosed" while this asks "how much corolla is visually dominant"; report their correlation explicitly rather than assuming redundancy.
